name: GlobalNeoNat Infant Incubator
description: The GlobalNeoNat Incubator is a prototype that has a hemisphrical hood, a mattress that can change shape, a phototherapy umbrella, and a protection cover that stimulates the newborn’s visual system while reducing heat losses.
